members.name: inputColor
members.description: The current point color being evaluated, from the first input, or a default if not present, expressed as a 4-tuple (r, g, b, a).

members.name: inputColor2
members.description: The current point color being evaluated, from the second input, or a default if not present, expressed as a 4-tuple (r, g, b, a).

members.name: inputNormal
members.description: The current point normal being evaluated, from the first input, or a default if not present, expressed as a 3-tuple (n1, n2, n3).

members.name: inputNormal2
members.description: The current point normal being evaluated, from the second input, or a default if not present, expressed as a 3-tuple (n1, n2, n3).

members.name: inputPoint
members.description: The current point being evaluated, from the first input.

members.name: inputPoint2
members.description: The current point being evaluated, from the second input.

members.name: inputTexture
members.description: The current point texture being evaluated, from the first input, or a default if not present, expressed as a 3-tuple (u, v, w).

members.name: inputTexture2
members.description: The current point texture being evaluated, from the second input, or a default if not present, expressed as a 3-tuple (u, v, w).

_provenance.fact: scraped from the PointSOP Class wiki page
